name: Data Scientist
description: Data scientists extract insights from complex datasets using statistical analysis, machine learning, and programming. They help organizations make data-driven decisions across product, marketing, and operations.
bullets: Built predictive model with 94% accuracy that reduced customer churn by 25%, saving $1.2M in annual revenue
Developed NLP pipeline processing 50K+ customer support tickets monthly, automating response categorization
Created interactive Tableau dashboards used by 200+ stakeholders to track KPIs and identify growth opportunities
